records.ety: [L. confabulatus, p. p. of confabulary, to converse together; con- + fabulary to speak, fr. fabula. See Fable.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Confabulated; p. pr. & vb. n. Confabulating.]

defs: To talk familiarly together; to chat; to prattle.
quotes: I shall not ask Jean Jaques Rousseau If birds confabulate or no.
